## ShNodes.ShWordPartNode type

The union of concrete node types mvdan/sh's `syntax.WordPart` interface can hold.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ShWordPartNode =
  | ShArithmExpNode
  | ShBraceExpNode
  | ShCmdSubstNode
  | ShDblQuotedNode
  | ShExtGlobNode
  | ShLitNode
  | ShParamExpNode
  | ShProcSubstNode
  | ShSglQuotedNode;
```
